---
title: "Week 14 — Nonlinear Regression"
subtitle: "ECON 3209 · Kerala Agricultural University"
---

## Week 14 Overview

Extend the linear model to log, polynomial, spline, and piecewise specifications and fit curves in Python.

| Lecture | Topic | Slides |
|---------|-------|--------|
| Lecture 1 | Log & Polynomial Models | [Open →](lecture-01.qmd) |
| Lecture 2 | Splines & Piecewise Models | [Open →](lecture-02.qmd) |
| Lecture 3 | Python Curve Fitting | [Open →](lecture-03.qmd) |
